member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.AnalogConverter
member.summary: Analog input converter
member.param: Raw analog input value

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.Analog
member.summary: Configures and reports analog inputs via Arduino pins A0 to A7.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Analog.UseConverter(RoboTx.Api.AnalogConverter,RoboTx.Api.AnalogInput[])
member.summary: Assigns a function to one or more analog inputs to convert the normal range of analog values from 0 to 1023, to another range of values.
member.param: A function that converts the analog values to another range of values.
One or more analog inputs.
member.exception: converter is null or input is null.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Analog.SetSampleRate(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the rate at which the analog pins are sampled.
member.param: Sample rate in hertz in the range of 1 to 50.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.
sampleRateHz has value less than 1 or greater than 50.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Analog.EnableInputsA(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Enables analog inputs whose sources are Arduino pins A0, A1, A2, A3, A4, A5, A6 and A7. The default sample rate is 10Hz. A short delay may need to be implemented after a call to this method to allow analog values to start being received. Enable only the input sources that are needed. Digital inputs for the specified Arduino pins are disabled.
member.param: Any combination of pins from the set of {0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7}.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.
inputPins is null or not supplied.
inputPins contains out of range value.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Analog.DisableInputsA(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Disables analog inputs whose sources are Arduino pins A0, A1, A2, A3, A4, A5, A6 and A7. Digital inputs for the specified Arduino pins are also disabled.
member.param: Any combination of pins from the set of {0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7}.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.
inputPins is null or not supplied.
inputPins contains out of range value.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Analog.A0
member.summary: Gets the analog reading of pin A0 whose value is between 0 and 1023 inclusive. The pin must be enabled for analog input before values become available.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Analog.A1
member.summary: Gets the analog reading of pin A1 whose value is between 0 and 1023 inclusive. The pin must be enabled for analog input before values become available.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Analog.A2
member.summary: Gets the analog reading of pin A2 whose value is between 0 and 1023 inclusive. The pin must be enabled for analog input before values become available.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Analog.A3
member.summary: Gets the analog reading of pin A3 whose value is between 0 and 1023 inclusive. The pin must be enabled for analog input before values become available.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Analog.A4
member.summary: Gets the analog reading of pin A4 whose value is between 0 and 1023 inclusive. The pin must be enabled for analog input before values become available.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Analog.A5
member.summary: Gets the analog reading of pin A5 whose value is between 0 and 1023 inclusive. The pin must be enabled for analog input before values become available.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Analog.A6
member.summary: Gets the analog reading of pin A6 whose value is between 0 and 1023 inclusive. The pin must be enabled for analog input before values become available.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Analog.A7
member.summary: Gets the analog reading of pin A7 whose value is between 0 and 1023 inclusive. The pin must be enabled for analog input before values become available.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Analog.ValidateInputPins(System.Int32[])
member.exception: inputPins is null or not supplied.
inputPins contains out of range value.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.AnalogInput
member.summary: Represents the value of a given analog input.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.AnalogInput.Value
member.summary: Gets the analog input value.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.AnalogInput.op_Implicit(RoboTx.Api.AnalogInput)~System.Single
member.summary: Implicit float cast operator.
member.param: AnalogInput instance.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.AnalogInput.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the value.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.AnalogMessage.SetSampleRate(System.Int32)
member.exception: sampleRateHz has value less than 1 or greater than 50.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.Config
member.summary: Configures the type of motor driver connected to the Arduino.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ConnectionKeeper.KeepAliveTask
member.summary: Task to signal connection alive to Arduino.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ConnectionKeeper.Cancel
member.summary: Cancels the task.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.ConnectionMessage
member.summary: Sends connection related information to the Arduino.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ConnectionMessage.Open
member.summary: Signal to the Arduino that the client has opened the connection.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ConnectionMessage.Close
member.summary: Signal to the Arduino that the client is closing the connection.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.ConnectionState
member.summary: Informs the connected state of the computer with the Arduino.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.ConnectionState.IsClosing
member.summary: Returns true if the method was previously called. Returns false otherwise. This property is for monitoring by background threads which should exit gracefully when the property returns true.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.ConnectionState.IsConnected
member.summary: Returns true if the serial port is connected to the Arduino, false otherwise.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.ContinuousSensor
member.summary: Base class for any sensor that continuously reports values, after being enabled. Once the values are available, the state of the sensor is set to ready.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.ContinuousSensor.IsReady
member.summary: Returns true if the sensor values are available for reading.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.ContinuousSensor.IsEnabled
member.summary: Returns true if the sensor has been enabled.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ContinuousSensor.SetReady
member.summary: Use to indicate that the sensor values have been received.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ContinuousSensor.Enable
member.summary: Use to enable the sensor and start reporting values.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ContinuousSensor.Disable
member.summary: Use to disable the sensor and stop reporting values.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.Digital
member.summary: Configures and reports digital inputs via Arduino pins defined in the firmware profile. By default the input pins are A0 to A4, but can be overridden for a specific profile using firmware macro DIGITAL_INPUT_PINS. Digital inputs are identified by their index position. I.e. index 0 by default corresponds to A0, index 1 to A1 etc. Also reports received IR commands sent by an IR remote control.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Digital.IN0
member.summary: Gets the digital reading for input 0 whose value is either true or false. The corresponding pin must be enabled for digital input before values become available.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Digital.IN1
member.summary: Gets the digital reading for input 1 whose value is either true or false. The corresponding pin must be enabled for digital input before values become available.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Digital.IN2
member.summary: Gets the digital reading for input 2 whose value is either true or false. The corresponding pin must be enabled for digital input before values become available.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Digital.IN3
member.summary: Gets the digital reading for input 3 whose value is either true or false. The corresponding pin must be enabled for digital input before values become available.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Digital.IN4
member.summary: Gets the digital reading for input 4 whose value is either true or false. The corresponding pin must be enabled for digital input before values become available.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Digital.EnableInputs(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Enables digital inputs and events whose sources are Arduino pins defined in the firmware profile. A short delay may need to be implemented after a call to this method to allow digital values to start being received. Enable only the input sources that are needed. Analog inputs for corresponding Arduino pins are disabled. Input pins are identified by their index position in the list of Arduino pins in firmware macro DIGITAL_INPUT_PINS.
member.param: The index positions of input pins whose value is between 0 an 4 inclusive.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.
inputPins not supplied.
inputPins contains out of range value.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Digital.DisableInputs(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Disables digital inputs and events whose sources are Arduino pins defined in the firmware profile. Analog inputs for corresponding Arduino pins are disabled. The inverted configuration of any disabled inputs are reset. Input pins are identified by their index position in the list of Arduino pins in firmware macro DIGITAL_INPUT_PINS.
member.param: The index positions of input pins whose value is between 0 an 4 inclusive.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.
inputPins not supplied.
inputPins contains out of range value.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Digital.InvertInputs(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Configures Arduino digital inputs to be detected on Low (inverted) signal. This method should be called before enabling any pins for digital input. Input pins are identified by their index position in the list of Arduino pins in firmware macro DIGITAL_INPUT_PINS.
member.param: The index positions of input pins whose value is between 0 an 4 inclusive.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.
inputPins not supplied.
inputPins contains out of range value.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Digital.ResetInputsState(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Resets the state of the specified inputs from true to false. Input pins are identified by their index position in the list of Arduino pins in firmware macro DIGITAL_INPUT_PINS.
member.param: The index positions of input pins whose value is between 0 an 4 inclusive.
member.exception: inputPins not supplied.
inputPins contains out of range value.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Digital.GetInputEvent
member.summary: If an input event (e.g. button press) has been detected, get its value or return -1 otherwise. Use class Input for symbolic labels for input events. Input events are only detected for Arduino pins that have been enabled.
member.returns: An integer value representing a detected input event. A value of -1 indicates not events detected.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Digital.ClearInputEvents(System.Int32)
member.summary: Clears queued inputs from the internal buffer and resets the current readings to false. Clears for the duration specified by parameter timeoutMs.
member.param: Time in milliseconds for which the input buffer is cleared.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Digital.InputCount
member.summary: Returns the number of digital inputs that are set to true.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Digital.GetIRCommand
member.summary: Gets the value and pressed state of an IR command button if one has been received by pressing a button on an IR remote control.
member.returns: A tuple consisting of the IR command code and its pressed state. A value of -1 for the IR command indicates none received. A value of true for the pressed state indicates button in pressed state. False indicates button released.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Digital.UseIrCommandConverter(RoboTx.Api.IrCommandConverter)
member.summary: Registers a function to convert IR command codes to a string value.
member.param: A function to convert IR command codes to a string value.
member.exception: converter is null.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Digital.ToString
member.summary: Returns the digital inputs as a binary string.
member.returns: Digital inputs as a binary string

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Digital.ValidateInputPins(System.Int32[])
member.exception: inputPins not supplied.
inputPins contains out of range value.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.DigitalInput
member.summary: Represents the value of a given digital input.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.DigitalInput.Value
member.summary: Gets the digital input value.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.DigitalInput.op_Implicit(RoboTx.Api.DigitalInput)~System.Boolean
member.summary: Implicit bool cast operator.
member.param: Intance of DigitalInput.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.DigitalInput.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the value.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.DisplayLcd
member.summary: Writes text to a 16x2 or 16x4 I2C LCD display.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.DisplayLcd.Clear
member.summary: Clears the display.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.DisplayLcd.PrintAt(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Displays text starting at a specific location of the LCD display. Causes the LCD backlight to switch on. The backlight may switch off after a predefined duration in the firmware.
member.param: The column (zero based) from which to display text.
The row (zero based) from which to display text.
The text to display.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.DisplayLcd.Sleep
member.summary: Switches off the LCD backlight.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.DisplayLcd.WakeUp
member.summary: Switches on the LCD backlight. The backlight may switch off after a predefined duration in the firmware.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.DisplayLed
member.summary: Writes a string to a 4 digit 7 segment LED display. The Arduino pins assigned for the display are configured in the firmware settings.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.DisplayLed.Write(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a short string to the 7 segment LED display. String will be truncated if it does not fit the display.
member.param: The string to display, which will be truncated if it does not fit the display.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.DisplayLed.Write(System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes an integer value to the 7 segment display.
member.param: The value to display. Will be show as 'E' if its length does not fit the display.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.DisplayLed.Write(System.Double)
member.summary: Writes a double value to the 7 segment display.
member.param: The value to display. Will be show as 'E' if its length does not fit the display.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.DisplayLed.Write(System.Single)
member.summary: Writes a float value to the 7 segment display.
member.param: The value to display. Will be show as 'E' if its length does not fit the display.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.AccelValues
member.summary: Holds the most recent accelerometer values for the X, Y and Z axis.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.AccelValues.UseConverter(RoboTx.Api.MPUConverter)
member.summary: Registers a function to convert raw accelerometer sensor values to either calibrated values and or a different scale.
member.param: A function to convert raw accelerometer values.
member.exception: converter is null.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.AccelValues.X
member.summary: Gets accelerometer X axis value.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.AccelValues.Y
member.summary: Gets accelerometer Y axis value.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.AccelValues.Z
member.summary: Gets accelerometer Z axis value.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.AccelValues.Deconstruct(System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@)
member.summary: Unpacks X,Y and Z axis of accelerometer tuple.
member.param: X axis
Y axis
Z axis

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ColourMessage.#ctor(RoboTx.Api.ColourSensor)
member.summary: Constructor used for deserializing.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.ColourSensor
member.summary: Reports RGB and HSL values detected using TCS34725 I2C sensor. HSL values may give better results when detecting colours. For each colour to detect, obtain reference values with the sensor close to the object, and with the sensor further away. Compare readings against the range of reference values to identify the colour. This feature is only available in the Education Edition of the Robo-Tx API.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ColourSensor.GetRGBC
member.summary: Gets the red, green, blue and clear values reported by the colour sensor once it has been enabled. How long it takes for colour values to start being reported, and the subsequent reporting interval will depend in the integration time specified in the Enable method.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ColourSensor.GetHSL
member.summary: Gets the colour as H, S and L values reported by the colour sensor once it has been enabled. How long it takes for colour values to start being reported, and the subsequent reporting interval will depend in the integration time specified in the Enable method.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ColourSensor.Enable
member.summary: Enables the colour sensor to report colour values, using integration time 50ms and gain of x4. See overloaded method for specifying different integration time and gain values.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ColourSensor.Enable(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Enables the colour sensor to report colour values using specified integration time and gain.
member.param: Integration time expressed as a value between 0 and 5 inclusive. Use static class TCS34725 that has symbolic labels for integration time values.
Gain represebted as a value between 0 and 3 inclusive. Use static class TCS34725 that has symbolic labels for gain values.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ColourSensor.Disable
member.summary: Stops the colour sensor reporting colour values.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.DHTSensor
member.summary: Reports temperature and relative hudity values using a DHT20 sensor. This feature is only available in the Education Edition of the Robo-Tx API.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.DHTSensor.Temperature
member.summary: Gets current temperature reading in degrees celsius.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.DHTSensor.Humidity
member.summary: Gets current relative humidity reading as a percentage.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.DHTSensor.Enable
member.summary: Enables the DHT sensor to report temperature and humidity values.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.DHTSensor.Disable
member.summary: Stops the DHT sensor reporting values.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.GyroValues
member.summary: Holds the most recent gyrometer values for the X, Y and Z axis.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.GyroValues.UseConverter(RoboTx.Api.MPUConverter)
member.summary: Registers a function to convert raw gyrometer sensor values to either calibrated values and or a different scale.
member.param: A function to convert raw gyrometer values.
member.exception: converter is null.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.GyroValues.X
member.summary: Gets gyrometer X axis value.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.GyroValues.Y
member.summary: Gets gyrometer Y axis value.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.GyroValues.Z
member.summary: Gets gyrometer Z axis value.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.GyroValues.Deconstruct(System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@)
member.summary: Unpacks X,Y and Z axis of gyrometer tuple.
member.param: X axis
Y axis
Z axis

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.HSLColour
member.summary: Represents colour as Hue, Saturation and Lightness values.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.HSLColour.Hue
member.summary: Hue component.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.HSLColour.Saturation
member.summary: Saturation component.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.HSLColour.Lightness
member.summary: Saturation component.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.HSLColour.Deconstruct(System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@)
member.summary: Unpacks HSL Colour tuple.
member.param: Hue component.
Saturation component.
Lightness component.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.I2CRequestMessage.#ctor(System.IO.StreamWriter)
member.summary: Constructor used for serializing.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.LightMeter
member.summary: Reports LUX values from a BH1750 sensor. This feature is only available in the Education Edition of the Robo-Tx API.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.LightMeter.LuxValue
member.summary: Gets the LUX value reported by the light meter sensor.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.LightMeter.op_Implicit(RoboTx.Api.LightMeter)~System.Single
member.summary: Implicit float cast operator.
member.param: LightMeter instance.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.LightMeter.Enable
member.summary: Enables the light meter sensor to report LUX values.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.LightMeter.Disable
member.summary: Stops the light meter sensor reporting LUX values.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.MPUConverter
member.summary: MPU sensor converter. Use to convert raw MPU sensor readings to either calibrated values and or a different scale.
member.param: Either 'x', 'y' or 'z'.
Raw sensor value in integer form.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.MPUSensor
member.summary: Report accelerometer and gyro readings from an MPU6050 sensor. This feature is only available in the Education Edition of the Robo-Tx API.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.MPUSensor.Accel
member.summary: Reports accelerometer readings from an MPU6050 sensor.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.MPUSensor.Gyro
member.summary: Reports gyrometer readings from an MPU6050 sensor.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.MPUSensor.Enable
member.summary: Enables the MPU6050 sensor to begin reporting readings.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.MPUSensor.Disable
member.summary: Stops the MPU6050 sensor from reporting readings.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.PulseCounter
member.summary: Configures and calculates period of input pulses on configurable Arduino pin, as defined in the RoboTx firmware settings (default is A2). This feature is only available in the Education Edition of the Robo-Tx API.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.PulseCounter.Enable(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes and enables the pulse counter. Used for measuring pulses applied to a designated input pin defined. Max pulse frequency 500hz. Inputs on A2 will not be registered as events whilst pulse counting is enabled.
member.param: The number of milliseconds to wait for a pulse before resetting pulse period to 0. Must be between 250 and 10000 inclusive.
Trigger counter on either rising (1) or falling (0) edge of pulse signal.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.
timeoutMs is out of range.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.PulseCounter.Disable
member.summary: Disables the pulse counter.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.PulseCounter.Period
member.summary: Gets the pulse period (in milliseconds) reported by the pulse counter. Pulse counter must be enabled before values become available.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.PulseCounterMessage.#ctor(System.IO.StreamWriter)
member.summary: Constructor used for serializing.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.PulseCounterMessage.#ctor(RoboTx.Api.PulseCounter)
member.summary: Constructor used for deserializing.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.PulseCounterMessage.Enable(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.exception: timeoutMs is out of range.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.RGBColour
member.summary: Represents colour as Red, Green, Blue and Clear values.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RGBColour.Red
member.summary: Red component.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RGBColour.Green
member.summary: Green component.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RGBColour.Blue
member.summary: Blue component.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RGBColour.Clear
member.summary: Clear component.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RGBColour.Deconstruct(System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Unpacks RGBC tuple.
member.param: Red component.
Green component.
Blue component.
Clear component.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO
member.summary: The main class through which input and output operations are performed with devices and components connected to the Arduino.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.ColourSensor
member.summary: Reports values read using TCS34725 sensor. This feature is only available in the Education Edition of the Robo-Tx API.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.LightMeter
member.summary: Reports values using the BH1750 light meter sensor. This feature is only available in the Education Edition of the Robo-Tx API.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.DHTSensor
member.summary: Reports temperature and humidity values using a DHT20 sensor. This feature is only available in the Education Edition of the Robo-Tx API.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.MPUSensor
member.summary: Reports accelerometer and gyrometer readings from an MPU6050 sensor. This feature is only available in the Education Edition of the Robo-Tx API.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.PulseCounter
member.summary: Calculates period of input pulses on a designated Arduino pin. This feature is only available in the Education Edition of the Robo-Tx API.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Servo5
member.summary: Sets the range and position of servo motor 5. Servo5 is only available in the Education Edition of the Robo-Tx API.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Servo6
member.summary: Sets the range and position of servo motor 6. Servo6 is only available in the Education Edition of the Robo-Tx API.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.InstantiateOptional
member.summary: Instantiate classes available in Education Edition of API.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.EnvironmentCheck
member.summary: Perform licence check.

member.name: E:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.ListenerErrorOccurred
member.summary: Event is triggered when a Listener IO exception occurs. The event handler will likely be executed on a background thread.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.OnListenerErrorOccurred(Messaging.MessageListenerErrorEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises the ListenerErrorOccurred event when an IO error has been encountered by the MessageListener..

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.RobotId
member.summary: Gets the user defined ROBOT_ID string set in the firmware file Settings.h. Use the value of this property to distinguish between different robots connected at the same time.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructs an instance using a serial port name, 115200 baud rate and data terminal ready as true.
member.param: Serial port name.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Constructs an instance using a serial port name, baud rate and data terminal ready settings.
member.param: Serial port name.
Baud rate.
Data terminal ready. Set to false when connecting directly to Arduino R3 Uno and Mega 2560, set to true for Leonardo and Arduino R4 Uno. Set to false when connecting via bluetooth.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Connect
member.summary: Initiates serial connection with Arduino using port and baud rates specified in constructor.
member.exception: Serial port was not found.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.WaitUntilSensorsReady(RoboTx.Api.ContinuousSensor[])
member.summary: Waits up to 2000ms for specified sensors to become ready. The sensors must have been enabled beforehand. Analog sensors are enabled by default.
member.param: One or more sensors that can report whether they are ready or not.
member.returns: true if the sensors are ready within the timeout period, false otherwise.
member.exception: sensors is null or empty.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.WaitUntilSensorsReady(System.Int32,RoboTx.Api.ContinuousSensor[])
member.summary: Waits up to the timeout period for specified sensors to become ready. The sensors must have been enabled beforehand. Analog sensors are enabled by default.
member.param: A timeout specified in milliseconds.
One or more sensors that can report whether they are ready or not.
member.returns: true if the sensors are ready within the timeout period, false otherwise.
member.exception: timeoutMs must be greater than 0 and less than or equal to 5000.
sensors is null or empty.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.IsConnected
member.summary: Returns true if the serial port is connected to the Arduino, false otherwise.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.IsClosing
member.summary: Returns true if the method was previously called. Returns false otherwise. This property is for monitoring by background threads which should exit gracefully when the property returns true.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.ConnectionState
member.summary: Informs the connected state of the computer with the Arduino.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.NotifyClosing
member.summary: The method should be called in the main application to signal to background threads monitoring property IsClosing that they should terminate gracefully.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.LedDisplay
member.summary: Writes a string to the 7 segment LED display.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Display
member.summary: Sends text output to the LCD display.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Trigger
member.summary: A digital trigger for generating repeating pulse cycle patterns.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Analog
member.summary: Allows for configuring of analog input, and exposing analog readings.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.MotorConfig
member.summary: Configuration options for DC motors.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Motor1
member.summary: Controls speed and direction of motor 1.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Motor2
member.summary: Controls speed and direction of motor 2.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.ServoConfig
member.summary: Configuration options for servo motors.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Servo1
member.summary: Sets the range and position of servo motor 1.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Servo2
member.summary: Sets the range and position of servo motor 2.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Servo3
member.summary: Sets the range and position of servo motor 3.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Servo4
member.summary: Sets the range and position of servo motor 4.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Sonar
member.summary: Uses sonar to calculate distance by sending a ping and measuring the time lapsed before receiving the echo.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Switch1
member.summary: Sets a digital output to on or off.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Switch2
member.summary: Sets a digital output to on or off.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Switch3
member.summary: Sets a digital output to on or off.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Switch4
member.summary: Sets a digital output to on or off.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Config
member.summary: Configures some devices connected to the robot.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Digital
member.summary: Exposes digital input readings.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.CheckSerialState
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Close
member.summary: Closes connection with Arduino. DC motors and servo motors will be disabled, the digital trigger and digital switches will turn off, and the LED display will clear.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Closes connection with the Arduino and releases resources.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.RobotIO.Dispose
member.summary: Closes connection with the Arduino and releases resources.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.TCS34725
member.summary: Symbolic labels for colour sensor configuration settings.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.TCS34725.INTEGRATION_TIME_2_4MS
member.summary: Represents integration time of 2.4 ms.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.TCS34725.INTEGRATION_TIME_24MS
member.summary: Represents integration time of 24 ms.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.TCS34725.INTEGRATION_TIME_50MS
member.summary: Represents integration time of 50 ms.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.TCS34725.INTEGRATION_TIME_101MS
member.summary: Represents integration time of 101 ms.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.TCS34725.INTEGRATION_TIME_154MS
member.summary: Represents integration time of 154 ms.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.TCS34725.INTEGRATION_TIME_700MS
member.summary: Represents integration time of 700 ms.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.TCS34725.GAIN_1X
member.summary: Represents sensor gain of 1x.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.TCS34725.GAIN_4X
member.summary: Represents sensor gain of 4x.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.TCS34725.GAIN_16X
member.summary: Represents sensor gain of 16x.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.TCS34725.GAIN_60X
member.summary: Represents sensor gain of 60x.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.Input
member.summary: Input constants representing the pressing, holding and releasing of buttons, or triggering of contacts on Arduino pins defined in the firmware.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_1_PRESSED
member.summary: Button 1 was pressed.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_1_RELEASED
member.summary: Button 1 was released after a short press.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_1_SUSTAINED
member.summary: Button 1 is held down.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_1_SUSTAIN_RELEASED
member.summary: Button 1 was released after a long press.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_2_PRESSED
member.summary: Button 2 was pressed.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_2_RELEASED
member.summary: Button 2 was released after a short press.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_2_SUSTAINED
member.summary: Button 2 is held down.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_2_SUSTAIN_RELEASED
member.summary: Button 2 was released after a long press.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_3_PRESSED
member.summary: Button 3 was pressed.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_3_RELEASED
member.summary: Button 3 was released after a short press.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_3_SUSTAINED
member.summary: Button 3 is held down.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_3_SUSTAIN_RELEASED
member.summary: Button 3 was released after a long press.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.BUTTON_4_PRESSED
member.summary: Button 4 was pressed.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.None
member.summary: No digital input signal was detected.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.IN0_TRIGGERED
member.summary: Digital signal was detected on IN0.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.IN1_TRIGGERED
member.summary: Digital signal was detected on IN1.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.IN2_TRIGGERED
member.summary: Digital signal was detected on IN2.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.IN3_TRIGGERED
member.summary: Digital signal was detected on IN3.

member.name: F:RoboTx.Api.Input.IN4_TRIGGERED
member.summary: Digital signal was detected on IN4.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.IrCommandConverter
member.summary: Infra red remote sensor command converter. Use for converting command codes to a string value.
member.param: IR remote command code received.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.IrCommand
member.summary: Represents IR Command received by the IR remote sensor.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.IrCommand.Code
member.summary: Gets the IR command code.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.IrCommand.ButtonPressed
member.summary: Gets the pressed state of the command button. True indicates pressed.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.IrCommand.ButtonReleased
member.summary: Gets the released state of the command button. True indicates released.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.IrCommand.Received
member.summary: Returns true if an IR command has been received.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.IrCommand.Name
member.summary: Uses the registered IrCommandConverter function to convert a received IR command code to a string value.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.IrCommand.Deconstruct(System.Int32@,System.String@,System.Boolean@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Unpacks the IR Command tuple.
member.param: IR command code
String representation of command code.
Command button pressed state.
Command button released state.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.IrCommand.Deconstruct(System.Int32@,System.Boolean@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Unpacks the IR Command tuple.
member.param: IR command code
Command button pressed state.
Command button released state.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.Motor
member.summary: Controls speed, acceleration, duration and direction of a motor. The Arduino pins assigned for motors are configured in the firmware settings.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Motor.DurationLapsed
member.summary: Returns true if a previously set duration for driving the motor has lapsed. Returns false otherwise. See .

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.SetSpeedLimits(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the reverse and forward speed limits of a motor.
member.param: A value between -100 and 0 inclusive.
A value between 1 and 100 inclusinve.
member.exception: motor is null.
maxReverseSpeed or maxForwardSpeed is out of range.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.SetSpeedMultiplier(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets speed multiplier for motor. A negative value will reverse the motor direction. Allows for fine tuning of the motor speed to match the speed of the other motor.
member.param: A value between -2 and +2 inclusive
member.exception: speedMultiplier is out of range.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.DriveNoAccel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Drives the motor at a percentage of its maximum speed (either forward or reverse) and overrides any previously set acceleration.
member.param: Percentage of motor's maximum speed, e.g. -50 or +90.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.DriveNoAccel(System.Single)
member.summary: Drives the motor at a percentage of its maximum speed (either forward or reverse) and overrides any previously set acceleration.
member.param: Percentage of motor's maximum speed, e.g. -50 or +90.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.Drive(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Drives the motor at a percentage of its maximum speed (either forward or reverse) and overrides any previously set acceleration.
member.param: Percentage of motor's maximum speed, e.g. -50 or +90.
Setting to true overrides a previously set acceleration value.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.DriveForDuration(System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Drives the motor at a percentage of its maximum speed (either forward or reverse) for a specified duration.
member.param: Percentage of motor's maximum speed, e.g. -50 or +90.
Duration (in seconds) for which motor is driven.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.
Duration is out of range.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.DriveForDuration(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Drives the motor at a percentage of its maximum speed (either forward or reverse) for a specified duration.
member.param: Percentage of motor's maximum speed, e.g. -50 or +90.
Duration (in seconds) for which motor is driven.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.
Duration is out of range.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.Drive(System.Int32)
member.summary: Drives the motor at a percentage of its maximum speed (either forward or reverse).
member.param: Percentage of motor's maximum speed, e.g. -50 or +90.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.Drive(System.Single)
member.summary: Drives the motor at a percentage of its maximum speed (either forward or reverse).
member.param: Percentage of motor's maximum speed, e.g. -50 or +90.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.SetAcceleration(System.Single)
member.summary: Configures motor acceleration by specifying the time (in seconds) it takes to reach maximum speed from stationary position.
member.param: Time (in seconds) to reach maximum speed from stationary. Minimum value is 0, maximum is 10.
member.exception: timeToMaxSpeed is out of range.
Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.StopAccelerating
member.summary: If motor is accelerating, holds the motor at the current speed.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.ValidateDuration(System.Single)
member.exception: duration is out of range.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Motor.ToInt(System.Single)
member.summary: Rounds float to the nearest whole integer.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.MotorConfig
member.summary: Configuration options for DC motors.

members.member:
Sets speed multiplier for motor. A negative value will reverse the motor direction. Allows for fine tuning of the motor speed to match the speed of the other motor.
A value between -2 and +2 inclusive The motor that will be affected. motor is null. /// speedMultiplier is out of range.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.MotorConfig.SetSpeedLimits(System.Int32,System.Int32,RoboTx.Api.Motor)
member.summary: Sets the reverse and forward speed limits of a motor.
member.param: A value between -100 and 0 inclusive.
A value between 1 and 100 inclusinve.
The motor that will be affected.
member.exception: motor is null.
maxReverseSpeed or maxForwardSpeed is out of range.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.MotorDriveCommand
member.summary: Used for keeping track of motor commands for ensuring repetetive commands are not seriaiized at high frequency.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.NamespaceDoc
member.summary: The namespace contains classes for the Robo-Tx API that interacts with the Robo-Tx firmware deployed to an Arduino.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.Servo
member.summary: Configures the range and the position setting of a servo motor. The Arduino pins assigned for servo motors are configured in the firmware settings.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Servo.SetAngleLimits(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the servo angle lower and upper limits to prevent the servo travelling beyond physical boundaries.
member.param: An angle >= 0 and < angleUpperLimit
An angle > angleLowerLimit and <= servo max angle
member.exception: Either angleLowerLimit or angleUpperLimit is out of range.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Servo.Range
member.summary: Gets the servo range settings.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Servo.SetServoType(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the range of the servo motor in terms of its maximum angle to ensure correct positioning.
member.param: Maximum angle of the servo. Must be between 180 and 360 degrees inclusive.
member.exception: angleRange is out of range.
Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Servo.SetServoType(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the range of specified servo motor in terms of minimum and maximum pulse width to ensure correct positioning.
member.param: Maximum angle of the servo. Must be between 180 and 360 degrees inclusive.
Minimum pulse width expressed as milliseconds. Must be between 500 and 1250 inclusive.
Maximum pulse width expressed as milliseconds Must be between minPulseWidth and 2500 inclusive.
member.exception: Either angleRange, minPulseWidth or maxPulseWidth are out of range.
Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Servo.SetSpeed(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the speed with which the servo moves to a specified position. The actual speed and range of speed will depend on the type of servo used. By default the servo is set to move at maximum speed.
member.param: A value starting from 1 (slowest) to 10 (fastest) that correlates with servo speed.
member.exception: speedStep is out of range.
Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Servo.Position
member.summary: Gets the current position angle of the servo that was set using . The value returned is not guaranteed to reflect the actual physical position of the servo, since it can take time for the servo to move to a given position, or the servo may have been manually re-positioned whilst in a stopped state.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Servo.SetPosition(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the position angle of a specified servo motor.
member.param: The position angle to rotate to. Must be between 0 and maximum angle range set by method SetRange(). The angle value is constrained to the limits specified using
member.exception: angle is out of range.
Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Servo.Stop
member.summary: Stops the specified servo so it no longer maintains its position.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.ServoConfig
member.summary: Configuration options for servo motors.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ServoConfig.SetAngleLimits(System.Int32,System.Int32,RoboTx.Api.Servo)
member.summary: Sets the servo angle lower and upper limits to prevent the servo travelling beyond physical boundaries.
member.param: An angle >= 0 and < angleUpperLimit
An angle > angleLowerLimit and <= servo max angle
The servo that will be affected.
member.exception: servo is null.
Either angleLowerLimit or angleUpperLimit is out of range.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ServoConfig.SetSpeedLimit(System.Int32,RoboTx.Api.Servo[])
member.summary: Sets the maximum speed of the servos.
member.param: Maximum speed of the servo whose value is between 1 and 10 inclusive.
The servo that will be affected.
member.exception: servo is null or has null elements.
maxSpeed is out of range.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.ServoConfig.SetType(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,RoboTx.Api.Servo[])
member.summary: Sets the type of specified servo motor in terms of minimum and maximum pulse width to ensure correct positioning.
member.param: Maximum angle of the servo. Must be between 180 and 360 degrees inclusive.
Minimum pulse width expressed as milliseconds. Must be between 500 and 1250 inclusive.
Maximum pulse width expressed as milliseconds Must be between minPulseWidth and 2500 inclusive.
The servo that will be affected.
member.exception: servo is null or has null elements.
Either angleRange, minPulseWidth or maxPulseWidth are out of range.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.ServoRange
member.summary: Maintains the range settings for a servo.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.ServoRange.MaxAngle
member.summary: Gets the maximum physical angle of the servo.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.ServoRange.LowerLimit
member.summary: Gets the angle lower limit set for the servo.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.ServoRange.UpperLimit
member.summary: Gets the angle upper limit set for the servo.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.Sonar
member.summary: Uses sonar to calculate distance by sending a ping and measuring the time lapsed before receiving the echo. The maximum distance that can be measured is 165 Centimetres. Sonar works best to detect objects with hard surfaces that reflect sound well. The sonar sensor may detect a closer object off to the side instead of a farther object straight ahead. The Arduino pins assigned for the sonar module are configured in the firmware settings.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Sonar.Ping
member.summary: Sends one ping using a sonar module.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Sonar.Clear
member.summary: Clears the current distance value.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Sonar.DistanceAcquired
member.summary: Returns true if a distance value has been calculated from the sonar echo. Returns false if no echo was received in time.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Sonar.GetDistance
member.summary: Gets the distance calculated from the sonar echo after calling Ping(). A value of -1 indicates no echo was received in time. Note that a call to this method will reset the distance to -1. Therefore, the caller should store the value returned in a variable.
member.returns: Distance calculated as a result of an echo received after a sonar ping.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.Switch
member.summary: Sets a digital output to on or off. The Arduino digital pin and values that represent on and off are configured in the firmware settings.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Switch.On
member.summary: Switches on the digital output.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Switch.OnForDuration(System.Single)
member.summary: Switches on the digital output for the specified duration in seconds.
member.param: Duration in seconds. Value must be between 0 and 600 inclusive.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Switch.DurationLapsed
member.summary: Returns true if a previously set duration in seconds for the output has lapsed. Returns false otherwise. See .

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Switch.DurationIsEnabled
member.summary: Returns true if the switch duration is enabled. The enabled state is set to true when OnForDuration() is called with a non-zero duration value. It is set to false when On() is called.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Switch.IsOn
member.summary: Returns true if the switch is set to On, false otherwise.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Switch.Off
member.summary: Switches off the digital output.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.SwitchManager.ManageSwitches
member.summary: Manages the On duration of switches.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.SwitchManager.Cancel
member.summary: Cancels the task.

member.name: T:RoboTx.Api.Trigger
member.summary: A digital trigger for repeating pulse cycle patterns. Use for an audio or visual alert (e.g. active beeper) using repeating cycle patterns. The Arduino digital pin and values that represent on and off are configured in the firmware settings.

member.name: P:RoboTx.Api.Trigger.IsActive
member.summary: Returns true if the trigger is on or running a pattern cycle. Returns false otherwise.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Trigger.Off
member.summary: Stops the trigger if it is on or running a pattern cycle.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Trigger.On
member.summary: Switches on the trigger for an indefinite period.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Trigger.Pulse
member.summary: Trigger a short pulse.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Trigger.Pulse(System.Int32)
member.summary: Trigger a pulse for a specified period in milliseconds.
member.param: On for specified milliseconds.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Trigger.Repeat(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pulses the trigger indefinitely with a continous sequence of on/off periods.
member.param: On for specified milliseconds.
Off for specified milliseconds.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Trigger.RunPattern(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Runs a repeating pattern of digital pulses.
member.param: On for specified milliseconds.
Off for specified milliseconds.
Repeat the pulse/off cycle for specified number of times.
The number of times to loop (repeat) the pulse/off/cycle. 0=indefinite.
Interval between loops in millisecionds.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Trigger.SetOffPeriod(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the off period between pulses whilst the trigger is cyclng through a repeat pattern.
member.param: Off period in milliseconds.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: M:RoboTx.Api.Trigger.SetOffPeriod(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the off period between pulses whilst the trigger is cyclng through a repeat pattern.
member.param: Off period in milliseconds.
member.exception: Serial port is in error state or not open.

member.name: P:Licensing.LicenceInfo.LicenceDate
member.summary: Date of Licence issue.

member.name: P:Licensing.LicenceInfo.ProdCode
member.summary: Product code.

member.name: P:Licensing.LicenceInfo.MajorVersion
member.summary: Product major version.

member.name: P:Licensing.LicenceInfo.MinorVersion
member.summary: Product minor version.

member.name: P:Licensing.LicenceInfo.ExpiryDate
member.summary: Date of licence expiry.

member.name: P:Licensing.LicenceInfo.CustomerHash
member.summary: Hashcode of customer.

member.name: P:Licensing.LicenceInfo.SaleId
member.summary: Sale Id.

member.name: P:Licensing.LicenceInfo.LicenceIssuer
member.summary: Licence issuer.

member.name: M:Licensing.LicenceInfo.GenerateLicenceString
member.summary: Generates plain licence string from instance properties.

member.name: M:Licensing.LicenceInfo.GetLicenceInfoFromString(System.String)
member.summary: Consructs a LicenceInfo instance from a plain licence string.

member.name: T:Messaging.IDeserializableMessage
member.summary: Defines a deserializable message, for the purpose of communication over Serial.

member.name: M:Messaging.IDeserializableMessage.GetMessageType
member.summary: Returns the message type string. Must be unique for each implementation.

member.name: M:Messaging.IDeserializableMessage.OnBeginDeserialize
member.summary: Called when deserialization has begun.

member.name: M:Messaging.IDeserializableMessage.OnDeserializeProperty(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Called when a message property has been deserialized.

member.name: M:Messaging.IDeserializableMessage.OnEndDeserialize(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Called when message serialization has ended. Parameter messageComplete is set to true upon completion, and set to false if the message 'end' delimiter was not encountered.

member.name: T:Messaging.IDeserializableMessageFactory
member.summary: Defines a factory for deserializable messages. For use by the MessageListener.

member.name: M:Messaging.IDeserializableMessageFactory.GetMessageDeserializer(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a message instance, given a message type string. Returns NULL if message type is not recognised.

member.name: T:Messaging.MessageListenerErrorEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments containing Exception thrown by MessageListener when an IO error is encountered.

member.name: P:Messaging.MessageListenerErrorEventArgs.Exception
member.summary: Gets the Exception thrown by the MessageListener.

member.name: T:Messaging.MessageListener
member.summary: Listens for incomming messages on a stream and deserializes to correct type.

member.name: E:Messaging.MessageListener.IOErrorOccurred
member.summary: Event is triggered when an IO exception occurs. The event handler will likely be executed on a background thread.

member.name: M:Messaging.MessageListener.#ctor(System.IO.Stream,Messaging.IDeserializableMessageFactory)
member.summary: Creates instance with stream and a deserializable message factory.

member.name: M:Messaging.MessageListener.#ctor(System.IO.Stream,Messaging.IDeserializableMessageFactory,System.Char,System.Char,System.Char)
member.summary: Creates instance with stream, a deserializable message factory and message delimiter characters.

member.name: M:Messaging.MessageListener.ProcessMessageStream
member.summary: Processes the message stream, listening for incomming messages, then deserializes them.

member.name: M:Messaging.MessageListener.Cancel
member.summary: Cancels the processing of the message stream.

member.name: M:Messaging.MessageListener.IsDeserializingMessage
member.summary: Returns true if currently deserializing a message.

member.name: M:Messaging.MessageListener.DeserializeProperty(Messaging.IDeserializableMessage,System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes the property of an incomming message.

member.name: M:Messaging.MessageListener.EndDeserialize(Messaging.IDeserializableMessage,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Called when incomming message deserialization is complete or a new incomming message is detected. Parameter messageComplete is set to true upon completion, and set to false if the message 'end' delimiter was not encountered.

member.name: M:Messaging.MessageSender.Cancel
member.summary: Cancels the processing of the message queue.

member.name: T:Messaging.SerializableMessage
member.summary: An abstract class that supports serialization of simple properties for the purpose of communication over Serial.

member.name: M:Messaging.SerializableMessage.GetMessageType
member.summary: Returns the message type string. Must be unique for each implementation.

member.name: M:Messaging.SerializableMessage.Serialize
member.summary: Serializes object to the stream. This method is thread safe.

member.name: M:Messaging.SerializableMessage.IsSerializing
member.summary: Returns true of the object is currently serializing.

member.name: M:Messaging.SerializableMessage.Cancel
member.summary: Signals cancellation of serialization. Subclass implementation must decide how to cancel serialization.

member.name: M:Messaging.SerializableMessage.IsCancelled
member.summary: Returns true if the cancel method has been invoked.

member.name: M:Messaging.SerializableMessage.OnBeginSerialize
member.summary: Called when serialization has begun.

member.name: M:Messaging.SerializableMessage.OnSerialize
member.summary: An abstract method that serializes the object.

member.name: M:Messaging.SerializableMessage.SerializeProperty(System.String)
member.summary: Serializes a property to the stream. Set the propertyValue to an empty string and use the underlying stream if more formatting control of the property value is required.
